name: Gradient Callout CTA Section
description: Full-width banner with a Brand Blue centered headline (top third) and a single centered Deep Blue button (lower-middle) with a Gold arrow, overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient PNG. Solid Sunshine fallback. Signature four-value asymmetric button radius always required.
notes: If background must be skipped, remove only background-url/size/repeat/position — keep background-color #faa31b, headline color, button color, and button radius exactly.
